entities.car: a freshly washed red sports car

scenes.title: The Car Wash
scenes.background_prompt: A car wash exit area with wet concrete, a drainage grate, a towel station, and clear sky. No people, no vehicles.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A car wash exit area on a clear sunny day. A man in a white polo shirt and sunglasses stands with his arms crossed, smiling proudly at a bright red sports car that has just been washed and waxed. The car gleams intensely in the sunlight — every surface is mirror-smooth, reflecting the blue sky and surrounding buildings. Tiny water droplets still bead on the hood and roof, each one catching the light like a small lens. The wet concrete floor beneath the car shows the drainage grate. A rack of clean microfiber towels stands to the right. The car's chrome wheels and door handles are polished to perfection, and the windows are completely streak-free and transparent.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place man beside the red sports car, standing with arms crossed and smiling proudly. Place car freshly washed, mirror-smooth and gleaming in sunlight with water droplets beading on hood and roof.
scenes.scene_description: In the bottom left foreground, a patch of green grass is dotted with small yellow and white flowers and green clovers. A dark grey, wet paved road begins here, featuring several light blue puddles of water. A long, rectangular metal drainage grate with horizontal bars runs diagonally from the lower center toward the right middle ground, bisecting the wet road. To the right of this grate, in the bottom right corner, is another patch of green grass and dense bushes containing small white, yellow, and blue flowers. Moving into the middle ground on the left, a small, light-brown wooden shed with a slanted roof stands on a grassy area. Inside the open front of the shed, a stack of four folded towels in alternating shades of light blue and light green sits on a shelf next to three small, grey, square boxes. Behind the shed are low green bushes and several large, rounded trees with autumn-colored leaves in shades of yellow and orange. In the middle ground on the right, the paved road continues, and a red car with a rear spoiler is parked on it. The car is covered in small, light-blue water droplets. Standing immediately to the right of the car is a man with curly brown hair, wearing a green and yellow striped sweater, brown trousers, and brown shoes. The man stands with his arms crossed, looking toward the left with a smile. In the background, behind the car and the man, are rolling green hills and a small cluster of tan buildings with domed roofs. The scene is set under a bright blue sky filled with several soft, white, puffy clouds, with a pale yellow sun low on the right horizon, suggesting early morning or late afternoon light.

CH: man wearing a green and yellow sweater
S: bright blue sky with puffy clouds
wet paved road with light blue puddles
small wooden shed with folded towels
rolling green hills in the background
early morning or late afternoon sunlight

water is dripping off the car's body

the man feels satisfied with his work

the man plans to use the towels
A: the man stands with his arms crossed
water flows toward the metal drainage grate
the man smiles at his clean car

the road is covered in wet puddles

stack of four colorful folded towels

after he finished washing the car
